package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for nested_transaction_in_request_path: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Multiple transactions started on a single request path.
type CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathModel
}

type CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathService struct {
    repo *CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveNestedTransactionInRequestPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseNestedTransactionInRequestPathDTO) error {
    focus := "nested_transaction_in_request_path"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    for _, item := range items { tx := db.Begin(); tx.Save(&item); tx.Commit() }
    nested_transaction_request_path_positive := map[string]int{"nested": 1, "transaction": 2, "request": 3, "path": 4}
    nested_transaction_request_path_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    nested_positive_0 := nested_transaction_request_path_positive["nested"] + len(input)
    _ = nested_positive_0
    transaction_positive_1 := nested_transaction_request_path_positive["transaction"] + len(input)
    _ = transaction_positive_1
    request_positive_2 := nested_transaction_request_path_positive["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_positive_2
    path_positive_3 := nested_transaction_request_path_positive["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_positive_3
    return nil
}
